zh.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby於1145年出生在英國爾鄧翰 梅西。她於1160年與Sir Joceramus de Hellesby在英國英格蘭爾福洛善姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於1186年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby于1145年出生在英国爾鄧翰 梅西。她于1160年与Sir Joceramus de Hellesby在英国英格兰爾福洛善姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于1186年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Massey,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Massy, a pet form of Matthew . Compare Mace .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of several places in Normandy, such as Macey (Manche), Massy (Seine-Maritime), Macé-sur-Orne (Orne), and La Ferté Macé (Orne).
English: variant of Marsay (see Marcey ).

variants.name: Mace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Masse, probably a shortened form of Matthew (compare Massey and Massett ) or possibly of Thomas .
French and Breton (Macé): from the French personal name Macé, a vernacular form of Mathieu ‘Matthew’. Compare Masse 5 and Maze 3.

French (Macé): habitational name from Macé or La Ferté-Macé in Orne, the former so named from Gallo-Roman Macciacum (from the personal name Maccius + the locative suffix -acum), the latter from the personal name Macé (see 2 above).

variants.name: Massie
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeen): variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Marsee
meanings: English: altered form of   Massey  .

variants.name: Massee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Germain.
Possibly an altered form of English   Massey  .
French (Massée): from the feminine form of Massé (see Masse ). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Massa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Silvio, Annamarie, Biagio, Caesar, Carmela, Dante, Elisabetta, Ennio.

Italian: habitational name from any of various places called Massa, for example Massa Lubrense or Massa di Somma, both in Naples province, or Masse d'Albe in Aquila, all named from medieval Latin massa ‘farm, estate’ (from Latin massa ‘mass, lump, pile’, Greek maza). This surname is also found in southern France (see Massey 5).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Macey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .
Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Macej or Mačej and Polish Maciej , derivatives of the Latin personal name Matthaeus (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Masey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Macy
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby was born in 1145, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England. She married Sir Joceramus de Hellesby in 1160, in Frodsham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died in 1186, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby est née en 1145, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Joceramus de Hellesby en 1160, à Frodsham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée en 1186, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby wurde 1145 in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1160 in Frodsham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Joceramus de Hellesby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb 1186 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby è nata il nel 1145 nel Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England. Lei sposato Sir Joceramus de Hellesby nel 1160, nel Frodsham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1186, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesbyは1145年にイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで生まれた。1160年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアフロドシャムでSir Joceramus de Hellesbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は1186年にフランスピカーディソンメで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby(은)는 1145년 영국 체실르 던함 마시에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프로드샤에서 Sir Joceramus de Hellesby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1186년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby nasceu em 1145, em Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Sir Joceramus de Hellesby em 1160, em Frodsham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1186, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby родилась в 1145 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Joceramus de Hellesby в 1160 г. в местности фродшам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла в 1186 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby nació en 1145, en Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Sir Joceramus de Hellesby en 1160, en Frodsham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en 1186, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 41 años.
